reviews.review_title: One of the best VR games
reviews.review_description:
This is one of those games that is better in vr than on pc. It is starting to show the lack of support. Multiplayer has become pretty buggy. Major desync issues between players. Single player seems to be okay for the time being.
I would love to see support come back and maybe the other DLC added.

I have all three packages, and finished them about a year ago.  I just went back into the game a few days back and now the packages will not load.  The store says they're purchased.  I'd kind of like to re-visit the Back to the Future items.  Do the devs even monitor this, or do they not care that their product is denying access to extensions that customers paid for?

Please, can you fix the multiplayer? Yesterday, I tried sending invites to two friends and it wouldn't let them join. We really enjoyed the game together. I really hope you'll fix this, so I can leave a better rating.
I played it for an hour or less and I wasn't happy with what I seen do I asked for a refund and it was denied for no reason
Need more dlc maybe the Same as console and please pleas bring power wash slim two to vr

I absolutely love this game. But, the devs said they will not continue supporting it, a long time ago. It will not receive any of the additional content that came to the flat version, no quest 3 version. Presumebly the successor to this game will never release in vr either. Sad.. With QGO it's a much better experience though.
Love everything except the fact it's no longer updated.  I've been thru the entire game multiple times. I wish more was available to purchase.  The best of any similar game on any platform.
I don’t want to teleport.I want to walk around
Played the 2D demo on Steam, boring! However in 3D it is really fun. Perfect to wind down.

I'm about 80% complete and it's a very frustrating game to play. It almost never resumes successfully after I am done playing for the night, or even just for a couple minutes while I talk to someone without the headset on. It crashes back to the home screen.

Then trying to start again is also a pain. Frequently it will take 3-4 attempts to launch the game and get all the way through, back into my career's latest mission.

Then the most annoying thing is how often it just crashes and you lose your progress. This happens up to about 5 times a gaming session of about 2 hours. Occasionally you get lucky and this doesn't happen.

I've played to completion on Xbox One with maybe one or two crashes, but this Virtual Reality port sucks, avoid, or wait for a steep sale and prepare to be frustrated by bugs. Such a shame.

reviews.review_title: Lights are on…but nobody is home.
reviews.review_description: This power-washing game used to be oddly satisfying, a place to unwind while blasting grime off fresh new maps, but now it just feels stagnant. There haven’t been any new levels or challenges in ages, and I’ve scrubbed the same patios, vehicles, and rooftops so many times they almost feel cleaner than my real life. The once-relaxing hum of the washer now feels a bit sad, like it’s echoing through an abandoned backyard no one’s coming back to. It’s still a peaceful game, but without new content, it’s starting to feel less like zen and more like going through the motions in a world that stopped growing…feels bad man. I guess I’ll go back to the start….again.

reviews.review_title: Co-op does not work glitch since day one
reviews.review_description:
!!! warning co-op does not work !!!!!  There is a glitch with this game that will say the session is not active when your friend invasion this is the only reason people are buying this game is to play with their friends yes the best game itself is good and it’s different as it’s in VR compared to 
The Pc or console 
Yes, the game is good to an aspect but overall the issue would not be able to play with your friends. It’s a big reason it gets one star. This glitch has been around since the game first ever came out on console and VR. And it is something to do with the newer update. But yet they say they do not know what is causing it. So I do not know why they brought it to VR

I played the flat version a fair bit on console, but the experience is even better in VR. Unfortunately, it doesn’t look like this one is still getting new content and a lot of the add ons for the standard version haven’t been ported over. There are a few that I would have liked to see carried over.

I love this game. I have it on my Xbox and once I got my Quest 3 i downloaded it on here too. I would love if yall would add the Shrek add-on here on quest just like it’s on Xbox! I would definitely buy that add-on! Please consider it! :)

Great game but even using the save feature is no guarantee when you go back in all your hard work has gone to waste as it’s all dirty again as annoying as this is it’s also heavy on controller battery use it happens on all levels

This is excellent for mental health. The ‘water’ sound is soothing and who doesn’t enjoy using a jetwash? Especially one that doesn’t leave you cold, wet and filthy yourself? 
Unfortunately I finished the lot in two weeks and am now repeating. There’s nothing left to buy and no further stars to be gained. 
Version 2 seems to be out on Xbox so fingers crossed for a meta version soon too

January 2026: It’s devastating. Something happens, you go to passthrough, looking at your surroundings like you’re used to - surprise app crashes and you lost the whole last two hours of progress. 
It’s pure frustration. 
Power Washing is a great way to destress and despite small bugs and a bit granular visuals in whole a fantastic game. 
BUT I came back after months of not playing and the same thing happened that made me abandon it in the first place. Nothing got fixed even though this is a mayor flaw that can’t be ignored.  Either you remember to manually save every couple of minutes or you’re screwed big time. I’m feeling more stressed than before and back to abandon the game.
This could be a game I would recommend but not in this state.
Love this game . Please please bring number 2 to the quest one day

i would recommend it, from my experience, because ive now played both the VR version, The PC version and the console version. 
Its quite relaxing too

This games awesomely translated to VR, and i love it, but i was just wondering. I have the game on my playstation and have the warhammer DLC, is it coming to VR anytime soon? I’d love to play it on my headset.
Love this game but I’m tired of power washing the same things over and over! I NEED NEW GAMES!!! Plz bring back!!!!

reviews.review_title: Please bring power washer sim 2 to VR!!
reviews.review_description: I loved the first one I beg and I mean beg yall to plz make it on vr. It’s my favorite game ive ever played on vr. Even if it’s 60 bucks I’d still buy it on vr !!! Please consider making it on vr. Pleaseeee.
I love this game. Played it for many hours. However there is no new download content and it is becoming very stale. It's a real shame. They had a gem with this one. 🙁

I loved playing this game. I loved spending hours cleaning places and forgetting any stress I had irl. I was eagerly waiting for more content but now it seems the devs have just abandoned the VR game. There hasn't been any more dlcs and now the Powerwash Simulator 2 is coming out, and the devs replied to my comment that they don't have any plans on releasing the VR version. Super bummed about it because, in my opinion, a game like this works best in VR and is superior to PC or controllers.

reviews.review_title: I luv this game….its relaxing, fun and a
reviews.review_description:
I luv the colours, the details to each job. The first time I cleaned the van I was hooked.  It takes u out of myself and relaxes me from irl troubles.  I bought all the dlcs and r great, but SpongeBob won’t load.  

The train taking off in back to future after cleaning is my fave animation and cleaning the mini golf course is my fave job.

 Devs please resume support of quest VR and give us more dlcs!!!!!!! Plz plz plz

Love the game played the flatscreen version before I got a vr headset, now I don’t play flatscreen games anymore and this is the type of game that is meant for vr so it’s a shame to hear they are making powerwash simulator 2 with no vr support, why? This makes no sense, as you are making the game right now why not add a toggle option to be played in either flatscreen or Vr, I will not buy it unless it has that option and if it does I will buy it day 1, I get you don’t want to do another quest vr version but nothing stopping you adding vr support for the pc version, some of us do have pcs you know
It’s actually insane that they don’t plan on releasing a VR version!! It’s literally best played in VR. Hoping the devs reconsider

reviews.review_title: I felt empty after beating it. 10/10
reviews.review_description: Not only is the story/lore  bonkers and off the rails insane. It was fun, frustrating, addictive, and heartwarming. the ending really kicked my heart in the willy. The credits rolled, showing all your hard work and then all the characters you help all text you thanking you for said hard work all well this adorable hokey song about pressure washing plays. Then, when it's all said and done, you just sit there left with an emptiness and a hunk of plastic strapped to your face, wishing it never ended. Sure you could restart or get the dlc, but you know it will never match what you went through. All in all amazing game 10 out of 10 can't recommend enough 👌

reviews.review_title: I love it and the mobile version
reviews.review_description: Yeah the game is very satisfying but it’s become dead like zero players online
This game is permanently stuck bootlooping no matter how many times I restart and it and redownload it

reviews.review_title: Enjoyable game BUT co-op is glitchy
reviews.review_description:
I've been playing this game for almost a year now. It's really fun in the VR platform versus the PC, but I find the co-op DLC super glitchy (especially after an update). I've rebooted the game and headset multiple times but it still have issues.

1. Inviting a friend into game (keeps asking if I want to invite into Worlds) Ugh! 
2. Joining a DLC game (can't find friend on the list)
3. If it's successful, the game boots the friend after the stage has completed.

Single player has zero issues but multiplayer is pretty glitchy. It can get quite frustrating.
PLEASE PLEASE continue this game with a Power Wash 2 VR! Its the only game I play and it is so addictive. I love the realism with the VR headset. LOVE this game!

This is the best way to play Powerwash Simulator but it's a shame the VR Support was cut. It's a game you can keep coming back to but needs more support. Hopefully the second game eventually comes to the Quest 3. I can't go back to playing it on a flat screen now.

The least yall could have done before quitting this whole thing was provide us all the packages.  Thats why I can't give 5 stars. I genuinely love this game. Just disappointed! Then you guys have a powerwash 2 coming out. Honestly I only like playing it in Vr and this  is coming from someone who has Xbox, playstation, PC, switch, and steam deck.

reviews.review_title: Don't give up on a great game for VR
reviews.review_description: I am newer to the VR scene and as an older woman, its hard to find games I really enjoyed enough to play for hours. With this game, I lost hours of time as I just had to get everything clean! I loved being immersed in the world powerwashing and had no motion sickness since you can teleport. I actually used this game to help quit smoking. Game play was easy to figure out and the only issue I ever ran into was if I took off my headset, then put it back on, sometimes the game would be stuck and I would have to restart it. I took a star away since I found out there would be no further VR updates due to lack of numbers. I would like to say, don't give up on VR yet. It is still pretty new technology and systems are getting to be more affordable. I can also say, I did try powerwasher on the computer when I completed all levels and expansions in VR and I do not enjoy it as well as I did in VR. Please reconsider as I would definitely buy more if/when expansions were offered for the VR.
I enjoyed this app a lot until I couldn't access the Sponge Bob dlc that I paid for 😒

reviews.review_title: The game is great just one issue…
reviews.review_description: I could not give this a 5 star because if your a guy like me who wants to clean the whole map it’s really hard because it doesn’t show you where the last bit of dirt is I would have rate it a 3 stars but atleast it flashes for a second after like 5 mins or tryna find it but apart from that it’s great because it shows you exactly what you have cleaned and need to clean a game like this is pressure wash simulator on Roblox I brought this game to expect it to be the same but it was even better would have rated 5 stars if they had directions to where the last bit of dirt is

reviews.review_title: Love the game but want more for VR
reviews.review_description: Love this game but really wish you would decide to continue with your VR platform. This is so relaxing and serves my ODC needs. Please reconsider creating VR. That is the only reason I didn’t give it 5 stars as well. I’m addicted to this game and want more stories and power washing.
When I played I was so amazed when you play it even though it is expensive it still is worth the money so pls buy it.

I bought this on the recommendation of a close friend (Tara), and was she right or was she right.  This game/simulator is totally addictive, and the level of realism is 100% spot on.....if you're jet washing a square post it does not clean the bits the water can't reach without you having to reposition yourself to get the whole object clean.  

It's just like jet washing things in real life but without the 'faff and mess' that you get in reality.

I have given this game five stars, but from what I can gather the devs are now concentrating on Powerwash Simulator VR 2.

Please do not totally neglect people like me who bought this edition, as without us, you would not have sufficient funding to develop the game further.

PLEASE DO NOT FORGET US.

Thank you.

reviews.review_title: Extremely addicting, awesome game in VR
reviews.review_description:
Playing this game in VR is a completely different experience. It is where the game truly shines. Once you've tried it with a headset, going back to mouse and keyboard feels like a huge step backwards. The level of immersion and satisfaction you get from cleaning in VR is unmatched.

It is actually the game I play the most. It helps me relax, clear my mind, and unwind like no other. That is why it is such a shame the VR version seems abandoned. I understand it might not generate the same revenue as other platforms, but leaving it in this state is a mistake. Honestly, it would be more fair to remove it from the store than to leave it buggy and unstable. Right now it crashes frequently, especially when pausing or taking off the headset, and it is clear that at some point soon it might stop working entirely.

I truly hope the developers decide to pick it back up. This version deserves it.

I am giving it five stars because I am afraid all these negative reviews will backfire on us, and the developer might just pull the game from the store entirely. Not only the game is awesome and I want more, but the entire package including DLC cost a lot of money and I wouldn't be happy to see it gone.

A fantastic product. Hours of power washing fun with a mystery to be solved. 

The VR is amazingly matched with this game. The developers should feel really proud of such an intuitive clever and satisfying game. 

It is our loss that the platform won't have a VR 2 but it might happen. 

Get this game and clean up Muckingham!
When I first started playing the game I was obsessed with it but after getting back onto the game it just wouldn’t load and I can’t do anything about it…

PowerWash Simulator is a great game on all platforms however due to low sales causing little money to keep it in development VR was shelved leaving out dlcs and bug fixes. I think if PowerWash Simulator VR had been released for steam vr too rather than being a meta exclusive it would have done better.

reviews.review_title: Perfect for if your stressed or bored
reviews.review_description: Had a bad day at work or school and just can’t find any way to relieve the stress while being active and productive? Bored with nothing else to do? This game is for you! While there aren’t any more updates, the amount of cleaning you get to do is sure to keep you busy for HOURS! You can even play this with your friends! Switching between the nozzles is even satisfying on its own! Overall, 10/10. Worth the 26.75 w/ tax any day.
We need more power washing packs

reviews.review_title: My fave! Please make some more VR add on
reviews.review_description: So ZEN, engaging and so addicting. I just want to power wash all day!! I’m super bummed you have chosen not to continue providing updates for VR users. I would be so stoked to have a power wash 2!!!
This game plays extremely well with high immersion, and it is one of the few games I can play for hours, but sadly FuturLab discontinued it in favor of PowerWash Simulator 2 for PC(VR).
I loved this game on my laptop so when I got my Quest the other day it was one of the first things I bought. I love it! It’s even more fun than on the pc or console.

So I was in the Ferris wheel level and I was in a multiplayer lobby and I stepped onto the Ferris wheel pod with my friend and we both shrunk and our arm reach and hands shrunk and we left the game and rejoined and it happened again

reviews.review_title: Broken co op mode ruins game
reviews.review_description:
This is game MUCH better co op, but I ran into a bug that means I can only play the first stage of the Back to the Future DLC pack.   I bought the game because my wife and I are fans and wanted to play that level specifically.  

We can play the first level co op, but not any subsequent ones.  It just says your current location isn't joinable.  

Also when trying to "join a friends co op game" it shows no friends playing even when we are both on. 

The devs have abandoned this game so I don't expect this to ever get fixed.

reviews.review_title: one of the best games but sometimes anno
reviews.review_description:
it's really fun to play, but sometimes there are invisible dirt and sometimes you are stuck at 99% and it also hurts your neck if you look up the belt is really janky        
the controls are weird if you have stick drift you basically can't play and the words in the menu are really small.

reviews.review_title: Frustrating and you lose items &  levels
reviews.review_description: This game gets updated then the updates make it worse. I’ve lost the triple nozzle and some levels since update. No more updates so this wont get fixed now they broke it. OCULUS should refund people who bought it like myself.

not a game I'd ever touch flat, but in VR it's just so relaxing and rewarding lol

so yeah, devs gave up on VR as audiences are miniscule. But they gave us this little gem, can't we be thankful this is available?

The only minor technical fault to me is the ghosting reprojection, no big deal as you're mostly in one spot washing things away and then move on to another spot...

content is pretty great, even aside the 3 DLCs available. Enjoy.
So on my VR I am trying to continue dismissing but each time when I try to load in it's just a black screen please fix that
I mean I like the game just, it’s only pressure washing.

This is easily one of my favorite pastime games, both on PC and ESPECIALLY in VR. But the development studio has completely abandoned development of this game, and they didn't even bring it up to being in-line with the content of the PC (DLCs, Additional Career Story, etc.). They still have this priced like a top-tier VR title, and while it's still a really good game, it now deserves to be in the $1.99 discount bin at Walmart. If they want to treat it like trash, then it deserves to be priced like trash. I will change my review if development restarts, but I don't see that being likely anytime soon. If you're OK with no new content, this might be worth $10 at most, but you deserve to understand what you're buying.

This game is brilliant play it all the time but if you look at the version on Xbox One there are loads of downloads so why cant meta horizon do the same. It would be a great addition to the game just saying need to do better

reviews.review_title: Have to admit it, I LOVE this game.
reviews.review_description: Since I no longer live in a house with a driveway and yard I never get to spray down those areas and I was missing it! This game not only satisfied that itch, it provided me with tons of work. I was addicted and I want more! The ending to this one was the best ever! The music and the video, nice work team. (I don’t want to give it away for other’s. ) I wish there was a way to join others that you don’t know that just want to form teams or need some help or something because I don’t have any friends that play the game but I’d like to not always be alone on every job. CAN’T WAIT FOR PW 2!!

I wanna start this off by saying power wash simulator on console and PC is pretty awesome with that being said the VR port seems to be pretty good but the tutorial is ridiculous and un skippable to my knowledge so until they put it where you can skip the tutorial It’s not a good port ￼

reviews.review_title: Fun.. but has PROBLEMS and is ABANDONED!
reviews.review_description:
I was questioning the point of powerwashing in VR but ended up enjoying the gameplay. I like listening to podcasts and washing in VR with my sister. But i only rate the game two stars due to its problems...

The first problem is how unoptimized this game is for the Quest 3! There should be a graphic update for Quest 3 headsets because the hardware is capable of dishing out much better graphics. (Think of Batman and Metro) The water stream should have better effects to make the experience more immersive.

The WORST part is how DLC's can't be shared.. I bought the spongebob DLC, but my sister can't play because she doesn't own it. And it's absurd how she has to BUY THE GAME in order to buy the DLC. This is a really scummy decision that does nothing but harm customer experience. I initially wanted to buy all DLC maps, but I will NOT because of this...

For reference, Walkabout mini golf is a successful game that freely lets users share DLC's. Making the game app share friendly. Walkabout is beloved for many good reasons, and that is why the game is alive and well.

I'm aware that this game will no longer receive any updates... this is upsetting because if you guys didn't release such an unoptimized game in the first place, with scummy anti appsharing DLC mechanics. Your game would've been as successful as Walkabout mini golf.. the lack of revenue from this VR port isn't surprising. it's like you guys didn't even try...

If, for some reason, the devs are still reading reviews and therefore reading this. I guarantee you that I will further support the game by buying all DLC's if you take my suggestions to heart and update the game.
I love this game but I have just purchased the wonderland dlc (have receipt etc) but it's not showing in the game. It still says I need to purchase it.

i was playing the game as normal with no issues whatsoever but then when i go to open playground it wont let me open it i get stuck on the loading screen for as long as 10 minutes ive tried deleting it and reinstalling but nothing’s working
It needs more like the Xbox
If i go left handed i can move with my right and turn with left but i want to use the washer with my left hand and move with my left at the same time and turn with my right please fix this

…dunno why, but once you start a clean up, you have to finish.

Maybe it’s just me, but there are a couple of jobs I can’t finish though. The fountain in a park for example. I can’t clean the top.

I heard there’ll be no more DLC releases for this game, so it looks like I won’t be getting the Warhammer DLC, which is a shame.

After completing several tasks now, all I can do is the bonus jobs there’s only four of them and you just have to do them over and over because anything else you go to stay stuck on a loading screen. Very enjoyable game if they would fix this issue, but after doing research, I’m now learning this has been an issue all the way back in 2024.  Hopefully they plan to fix this, but seeing as to how long it has been going on, I doubt that is the case. So don’t waste $25 ￼ on the game is my advice

I like the app and it has a lot of options from small to large projects. I find some items are done with a quick spray and others I have to go over and over. It can be frustrating looking at the menu and then trying to find those items in the scene. The Y button does not highlight the dirt and so I am at 99% and would like to finish but can't seem to clean it all. It is overall a great past time and I like the option to have automatic spray.
This is such a relaxing fun game to play. Only problem there is only so many times you can keep cleaning the same things. More bonus packs are definately needed to keep the game fresh.

Loved PWS on Xbox (and bought DLCs too).
Although it's pretty much the same as the console version, the Meta Quest version is a literal game changer.

Become immersed in all of it's chilled out glory. Different angles and approach to cleans due to being in the environment. 
Love it, love it, love it.

Hugely disappointed the Devs have dropped the VR support, but it's still a cracker. 
If you don't have it, buy it! 

Can't wait for PWS2 on Xbox. 😁

I recently got this game on Quest+ a few days ago. I had heard of it before, but I never thought I would be interested in a game about washing things. Washing stuff? Really? However, I gave it a try, and it's dangerously addictive! You might find yourself losing hours of your life working for fake money while cleaning various items, and yet, you just want to keep going! There’s something about the beautiful colors and the shiny surfaces that emerge from all the dirt that really captivates your brain. I'm pretty sure there's a study about this phenomenon somewhere.

reviews.review_title: It’s way more dlc’s you could put out
reviews.review_description: Y’all just gave up on this game and didn’t even think about putting part 2 on here. Took my stars away

This is an awesome relaxing game. It really scratches that itch of making things look juuuuust right. It is the perfect game for VR, simple intuitive controls that just don't work with a controller or mouse, graphics are good enough and the game runs easily and smoothly on a Quest 3.

Such as shame that the 2nd game didn't make it to VR as well and development has stopped for this one. Hopefully someone picks up the game and keeps it going

I can't say enough of how much this game has helped me with my anxiety and being  able to relax after long day working with the public. I have a friend who's brother is on the spectrum and he also enjoys this game so I think that is a definite bonus! Alas I have completed it all including the DLC'S so WE NEED MORE PLEASE!!!!
Highly addictive, although I saw it is abandoned so I guess I will need a new plug. They need to collab with Dexter for a crime scene clean up game.

I am a grandma that gets on VR to play with my grandson. I found this game and was instantly addicted! I even got my adult son to play it with me and he was addicted also. We had a blast hopping around the different scenes and writing messages to each other on walls with the water. 
Some fun things and some bummers:
Fun stuff is you can feel the spray when having a water fight with your friend! Also fun is you can grab the scaffolding or ladder while they  are on it and move it. Of course this makes them fall to the ground and I have never laughted so hard. 
You can jump onto everything! The tiniest slope on any item and you can jump onto it and just walk up. Things like the massive fountain you can just keep jumping from one thing to the next and stand on the tip of the highest point. Jumping off is a bit scary but just close your eyes and you won’t feel a thing! Just open them after a few moments and you are standing on the ground. 

Bummer things:
When you do co-op there is no sound. If you don’t want to make a call from headset to headset then you can’t talk. Still fun to waterwrite messages. 
My son could see me on his list of friends but I could never see him so he always has to “invite” me. 
If he does not own the dlc he can’t help me clean.        
There is no way to get more places to clean. I’ve done them all and want more. Please devs make powerwash2 for VR!?!

It may sound silly to play a powerwash game on VR but it is so cathartic and satisfying after a long day. I wish real power washing was so easy and didn’t leave a muddy mess under foot! 😂

Will update with a 5th star if they release more dlc. I’m instantly in if powerwash2 hits the meta quest store.

I purchased this game for AUD$35 like 2 weeks ago and have basically completed it. It has been so fun and relaxing to play while listening to an audio book after a stressful day at work.
I have been up till 2 or 3am a couple of nights, just cleaning stuff. The little story and Easter eggs were really fun too.
I've just started the Alice in Wonderland add-on.

I bought all 3 DLC's the other day when this game went to Quest Plus. I can access Back to the Future and SpongeBob but when I click Alice it does nothing a pop up come up for the store but then disappears. I have it shown in my account as purchased and it wont load?? Will leave a more detailed review when I can access the game

After starting the career mode on a power wash simulator;
Every Time I close my eyes, I'm cleaning
When I'm dreaming at night, I'm cleaning 
When I'm sitting on the train my mind goes to cleaning
The virtual has become reality and I am cleaning my real kitchen and bathroom. My wife has never been happier.

Also the kids love it and jump in. The wonderful thing is that everything you do is making progress to improvement. You can jump in for just five minutes (ha ha good luck with that) and get something done. 

Graphics could be better, more realistic water effects would be amazing but probably impossible on the Quest 2 o
r 3. Radio stations to listen to as you work would be brilliant and a great way to add some comedy. More recognisable locations, pyramids, stonehenge, historic locations, statues etc. Rooms in a house or office. A lot of potential or expansion or sequels. 

 But overall this is VR GOTY for me.

Edit: More DLC please!
Please bring a Powerwash 2. It was very relaxing and releasing stress to me.
